name: FFmpeg Tools
description: Runs reviewed local FFmpeg transforms against host-staged Canvas media without exposing native paths or a shell.

tools.title: FFmpeg image output
tools.description: Run explicit FFmpeg arguments that create one image from staged Canvas media.

tools.title: FFmpeg video output
tools.description: Run explicit FFmpeg arguments that create one video from staged Canvas media.

tools.title: FFmpeg audio output
tools.description: Run explicit FFmpeg arguments that create one audio file from staged Canvas media.

tools.title: Extract frame
tools.description: Extract one PNG frame at a selected time from a video.

tools.title: Trim video
tools.description: Create one MP4 from a selected time range in a video.

tools.title: Crop video
tools.description: Create one MP4 from a selected rectangular region in a video.

tools.title: Create video-only output
tools.description: Create one MP4 containing the video stream without audio.

tools.title: Create audio-only output
tools.description: Create one M4A containing the audio stream without video.

description.default: Choose a time point and create a new PNG frame.
description.zh-CN: 选择时间点并创建新的 PNG 帧。

description.default: Drag the timeline handles to select a range and create a new video.
description.zh-CN: 拖动时间轴手柄选择区间并创建新视频。

description.default: Create related video-only and audio-only cards.
description.zh-CN: 创建相互关联的纯视频卡片和纯音频卡片。

description.default: Drag a rectangle over the video preview and create a new video.
description.zh-CN: 在视频预览上拖动裁剪框并创建新视频。
